title: Screen Brief
description: Structured interpretation of a designer prompt before UI composition. This contract defines artifact shape only; reasoning rules remain in guidelines/runtime/genai-reasoning-hierarchy.md.

prompt.description: Original designer prompt preserved as the brief unless it creates a critical failure.

interpreted_intent.description: Concise interpretation of the expected screen outcome.

user_role.description: Primary user or persona implied by the prompt.

primary_task.description: Main task the screen should support.

primary_decision_or_job.description: Decision, action or understanding the screen should make easier.

domain_object.description: Main business object, such as asset, site, recommendation, document, customer or service action.

business_context.description: Relevant domain context needed to avoid semantic errors.

evidence_needs.description: Facts, proof or source-system signals needed to support trust.

trust_and_validation_needs.description: Uncertainty, validation, proof-gap or safety concerns the proposal must preserve.

constraints.description: Explicit constraints from the prompt or detected from critical guardrails.

source_guidelines.description: Guideline paths consulted to interpret the brief.
